name: Low-Fat Tamale Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Masa harina or corn meal
The rest of the corn & chiles
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions, chicken, and garlic in a non-stick pan.
2. If not cooking too hot, cover and add water if it starts to stick; no oil needed.
3. Add zucchini, corn, chiles, canned tomatoes, and seasonings; cook 5-10 minutes.
4. In a bowl, mix dry ingredients well. Add wet ingredients and chiles/corn; blend until just mixed.
5. Pour filling into a casserole sprayed lightly with PAM. Top with corn mixture.
6. Sprinkle cheese on top and bake, uncovered at 350°F for about 20 minutes until bubbly.
The dish is less than 10 grams of fat per serving, and using non-fat cheese would reduce it further.
